name: Wisp (musician)
description: '''Natalie R. Lu''' (born 2004), known professionally as '''Wisp''', is an American musician, singer, and songwriter who rose to prominence with her 2023 single "[[Your Face (song)|Your Face]]". The song peaked at number seven on the [[Billboard Hot 100|''Billboard'']] [[Hot Hard Rock Songs]] and received a [[Music recording certification|gold]] certification by [[Pro-Música Brasil]]. The following year, Lu released her debut EP, ''[[Pandora (Wisp EP)|Pandora]]''. In August 2025, she released the full-length album ''[[If Not Winter (album)|If Not Winter]]'', which marked her first entry on the [[Top Current Album Sales|''Billboard'' Top Current Album Sales]] chart, peaking at number 37.
